item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Disabled Veterans Medicaid Access
item.description:
👀 Disabled Veterans Medicaid Access

Disabled veterans Medicaid access 119th Congress: VA-Medicaid coordination · Tricare-for-veterans interaction · cooperative-class veteran-care composing. Composes with Veterans Auto-Education + Veteran Crisis Line + Veterans Homelessness + #8 Defense Klaus. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
